assertions.description: Output includes a one-paragraph dataset overview and at least 3 distinct numbered story angles grounded in specific data points
Each angle includes a confidence rating (strong/tentative/requires verification) and 1-2 concrete reporting questions
No angle claims significance beyond what the data actually shows

assertion_results.note: Overview paragraph plus 4 distinct angles from building permits data
Each angle has confidence rating; demolition patterns marked tentative
Angles grounded in specific permit types and neighborhood patterns
Overview plus 3 angles from library data
Confidence ratings applied; digital shift angle strong, others tentative
Reporting questions concrete: which branches, what services changed
Overview plus 4 angles from EU farm subsidy data
Corporate concentration angle strong; small-farm squeeze tentative
No angle overstates what a 4-row sample can prove; full dataset verification noted

methodology: Binary assertion testing: 3 inputs (standard, minimal, European context) x 3 assertions per skill. Each assertion graded pass/fail based on whether generated output satisfies the requirement.
